acquisition method: Data were generated by using the Data-Dependent Acquisition (DDA) strategy.
alkylation reagent: Then iodoacetamide was added to the protein to make its final concentration of 11 mM
alkylation concentration: to make its final concentration of 11 mM
enrichment method: incubated with agarose beads coupled to anti-acetyl antibody PTM-104
instrument: performed MS/MS analysis by Orbitrap FusionTM (Thermo, United States) system.
labeling: After being labeled with TMT tag, the digested peptides with lysine acetylation sites were enriched and analyzed by LC-MS/MS.
reduction reagent: the protein was first reduced with DTT (5 mM) for 30 min at 56°C.
reduction concentration: the protein was first reduced with DTT (5 mM) for 30 min at 56°C.
